general.name: Restrictions iCloud & Apple Pay Exemption
general.description: Allow ApplePay and iCloud sign in
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>D23F378F-2068-41E0-A7E8-F1F73ABECC0D</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>D23F378F-2068-41E0-A7E8-F1F73ABECC0D</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions iCloud & Apple Pay Exemption </string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Allow ApplePay and iCloud sign in</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>EDC2624D-51CA-4509-9A55-31738D41490C</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>EDC2624D-51CA-4509-9A55-31738D41490C</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>MCX</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>safariAllowAutoFill</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>25B59EF0-57F0-4352-B4E7-67B31A4D76EF</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess.new</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>25B59EF0-57F0-4352-B4E7-67B31A4D76EF</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Application Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>familyControlsEnabled</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>E19F307E-091A-48DE-8852-139C19BE1523</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.coremediaio.support</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>E19F307E-091A-48DE-8852-139C19BE1523</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CoreMediaIO Support</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>Device Access Allowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>88AD7A8C-3FD1-42D1-AEEF-A27D8AB87BD1</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.DiscRecording</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>88AD7A8C-3FD1-42D1-AEEF-A27D8AB87BD1</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Disc Recording</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>BurnSupport</key><string>on</string></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>20424B58-58CB-4F52-A035-59BF32A7815B</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.appstore</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>20424B58-58CB-4F52-A035-59BF32A7815B</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>App Store</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>restrict-store-softwareupdate-only</key><false/><key>restrict-store-disable-app-adoption</key><true/><key>DisableSoftwareUpdateNotifications</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>E3816687-849B-4D97-8BD7-95103946B2FE</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.dashboard</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>E3816687-849B-4D97-8BD7-95103946B2FE</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Dashboard Widget Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>whiteListEnabled</key><false/><key>WhiteList</key><array/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>7C909E81-553C-43F7-BEF9-2E5A392BFFFA</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.finder</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>7C909E81-553C-43F7-BEF9-2E5A392BFFFA</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Finder Settings</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>ProhibitBurn</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>13A4E2D7-2FFA-4E75-B95C-B8A1D5D42661</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.gamed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>13A4E2D7-2FFA-4E75-B95C-B8A1D5D42661</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Game Center</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>GKFeatureGameCenterAllowed</key><false/><key>GKFeatureAccountModificationAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureAddingGameCenterFriendsAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureMultiplayerGamingAllowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>00AB5B33-EB1A-41B0-88CF-AADF065748DC</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>00AB5B33-EB1A-41B0-88CF-AADF065748DC</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowCloudDocumentSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudDesktopAndDocuments</key><false/><key>allowSpotlightInternetResults</key><true/><key>allowMusicService</key><true/><key>allowCloudKeychainSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudBTMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudFMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudBookmarks</key><false/><key>allowCloudMail</key><false/><key>allowCloudCalendar</key><false/><key>allowCloudReminders</key><false/><key>allowCloudAddressBook</key><false/><key>allowCloudNotes</key><false/><key>allowPasswordSharing</key><true/><key>allowPasswordAutoFill</key><true/><key>allowPasswordProximityRequests</key><true/><key>allowCamera</key><true/><key>allowContentCaching</key><true/><key>allowCloudPrivateRelay</key><false/><key>allowUniversalControl</key><true/><key>allowAirDrop</key><false/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseInstallation</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseRemoval</key><true/><key>allowUIConfigurationProfileInstallation</key><true/><key>allowUSBRestrictedMode</key><true/><key>allowCloudFreeform</key><false/><key>allowLocalUserCreation</key><true/><key>allowStartupDiskModification</key><true/><key>allowTimeMachineBackup</key><true/><key>allowARDRemoteManagementModification</key><true/><key>allowBluetoothSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowFileSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowInternetSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowPrinterSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowRemoteAppleEventsModification</key><true/><key>allowAccountModification</key><true/><key>allowDeviceNameModification</key><true/><key>allowAssistant</key><true/><key>allowFingerprintModification</key><true/><key>allowCloudPhotoLibrary</key><false/><key>allowGenmoji</key><false/><key>allowImagePlayground</key><false/><key>allowiPhoneMirroring</key><false/><key>allowWritingTools</key><false/><key>forceBypassScreenCaptureAlert</key><false/><key>allowMailSummary</key><false/><key>allowMediaSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowExternalIntelligenceIntegrations</key><false/><key>allowNotesTranscriptionSummary</key><false/><key>allowAppleIntelligenceReport</key><false/><key>allowMailSmartReplies</key><false/><key>allowSafariSummary</key><false/><key>allowNotesTranscription</key><false/><key>allowSafariHistoryClearing</key><true/><key>allowSafariPrivateBrowsing</key><true/><key>forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedMajorSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>allowAirPrint</key><true/><key>forceAirPrintTrustedTLSRequirement</key><false/><key>allowAirPrintiBeaconDiscovery</key><true/><key>allowScreenShot</key><true/><key>allowRemoteScreenObservation</key><true/><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedScreenObservation</key><false/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowFingerprintForUnlock</key><true/><key>enforcedFingerprintTimeout</key><integer>172800</integer><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock</key><false/><key>forceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses</key><false/><key>forceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveClasses</key><false/><key>allowEraseContentAndSettings</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C76678C6-04DC-4187-B828-55EEC728B373</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systempreferences</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C76678C6-04DC-4187-B828-55EEC728B373</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>System Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisabledPreferencePanes</key><array><string>com.apple.preference.digihub.discs</string><string>com.apple.ClassroomSettings</string><string>com.apple.preferences.FamilySharingPrefPane</string><string>com.apple.prefpanel.fibrechannel</string><string>com.apple.preferences.parentalcontrols</string></array></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>BB987ED5-8DE3-47D4-B4A3-8A370F49E488</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.preferences.users</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>BB987ED5-8DE3-47D4-B4A3-8A370F49E488</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>User Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisableUsingiCloudPassword</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>5E795A9B-632B-4028-9C37-04CA8C90790D</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systemuiserver</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>5E795A9B-632B-4028-9C37-04CA8C90790D</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>logout-eject</key><dict/><key>mount-controls</key><dict><key>cd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>harddisk-internal</key><array/><key>disk-image</key><array/><key>dvd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>blankdvd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>harddisk-external</key><array><string>read-only</string></array><key>blankcd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>dvdram</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>1F9CC786-444D-4E58-BAB7-FAAB6086428F</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.desktop</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>1F9CC786-444D-4E58-BAB7-FAAB6086428F</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Desktop</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>override-picture-path</key><string>/Users/Shared/Saks.jpg</string></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8F11FB24-B8A3-4083-9F7F-AFE482466AAF</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ShareKitHelper</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>8F11FB24-B8A3-4083-9F7F-AFE482466AAF</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>SHKAllowedShareServices</key><array><string>com.apple.share.AirDrop</string><string>com.apple.reminders.RemindersShareExtension</string><string>com.apple.Notes.SharingExtension</string><string>com.apple.share.Messages</string></array></dict></array></dict></plist>

computer_group.name: Config Prof - Restrictions iCloud & Apple Pay Exemption
